class.name: RecordReliablePdu
class.comment: FastDIS local patch: restore the missing DIS 6 Record-R PDU class so generation can treat standard row 63 as schema-backed. Evidence: the DIS 6 backbone carries Record-R as a standard row, and the adjacent reliable-management family uses the same field order that upstream DIS 7 RecordRPdu preserves.

attribute.name: requestID
attribute.comment: request ID provides a unique identifier

attribute.name: requiredReliabilityService
attribute.comment: level of reliability service used for this transaction

attribute.name: numberOfRecordSets
attribute.comment: Number of record sets in list
